parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ embeds: [{ title: '🆘 Nouveau Ticket Support', color: 16711680, fields: [ { name: '🏢 Client', value: $json.body.company_name || 'N/A', inline: true }, { name: '🔢 Ticket', value: $json.body.ticket_number || 'N/A', inline: true }, { name: '📋 Catégorie', value: $json.body.category || 'N/A', inline: true }, { name: '⚡ Priorité', value: $json.body.priority || 'normale', inline: true }, { name: '📝 Sujet', value: $json.body.subject || 'Sans sujet', inline: false }, { name: '💬 Message', value: ($json.body.message || '').substring(0, 500) || 'Aucun message', inline: false } ], footer: { text: 'Support Star Bizness • ' + new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }) }, thumbnail: { url: 'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/906/906794.png' } }] }) }}
